zh.Melun-Sud, Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de: 法國瑟-吉馬內默倫梅倫-素德
zh.Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Kingd: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德坎布萊
zh.lifeSummary: 當Louis De Melun I於大約1153年出生在法國瑟-吉馬內默倫梅倫-素德時，他的父親Josselin De Melun II25歲，母親Alpaïs de Marolles, Dame de Blandy19歲。他於1172年與Gisèle De Cambrai在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德坎布萊結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1182年8月20日享年30歲。

zh-hans.Melun-Sud, Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de: 法国瑟-吉馬內默倫梅倫-素德
zh-hans.Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Kingd: 法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德坎布萊
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Louis De Melun I于大约1153年出生在法国瑟-吉馬內默倫梅倫-素德时，他的父亲Josselin De Melun II25岁，母亲Alpaïs de Marolles, Dame de Blandy19岁。他于1172年与Gisèle De Cambrai在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德坎布萊结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1182年8月20日享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Melun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: metonymic occupational name for a producer of melons (Spanish melón, French melon).

Spanish (Melón): habitational name principally from the town of Melón in Ourense (Galicia) or Melón in Vigo (also in Galicia). This is probably a topographic name (meaning ‘altitude, rock’), a word of pre-Roman origin.

variants.name: Mellon
meanings: English (Lancashire; of Norman origin): habitational name from Meulan in Seine-et-Oise, now known as Meulan-en-Yvelines.
Scottish (Lanarkshire; of Norman origin): variant of   Melville  .

nameMeanings.name: Louis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hlōd ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. It was very common in French royal and noble families. Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

variants.name: Lewie
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Louis  , or a pet form of   Lewis .

variants.name: Louie
meanings: Variant spelling of   Lewie   or   Louis  , currently in fashion.

variants.name: Lewi
meanings: form, since the Middle Ages, of the French name Louis . In modern use it is also in part a transferred use of the surname derived from this given name, or from Anglicized forms of Gaelic Mac Lughaidh ‘son of Lughaidh ’ or Welsh Llewelyn .

en.lifeSummary: When Louis De Melun I was born about 1153, in Melun-Sud, Melun, Seine-et-Marne, France, his father, Josselin De Melun II, was 25 and his mother, Alpaïs de Marolles, Dame de Blandy, was 19. He married Gisèle De Cambrai in 1172, in Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 20 August 1182, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Louis De Melun I est né environ 1153, à Melun-Sud, Melun, Seine-et-Marne, France, son père, Josselin De Melun II, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Alpaïs de Marolles, Dame de Blandy, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Gisèle De Cambrai en 1172, à Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 20 août 1182, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Louis De Melun I um 1153 in Melun-Sud, Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Josselin De Melun II 25 und seine Mutter Alpaïs de Marolles, Dame de Blandy 19. Er hat 1172 in Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich Gisèle De Cambrai geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 20. August 1182 im Alter von 30 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Louis De Melun I è nato il circa 1153 nel Melun-Sud, Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Francia, il suo padre, Josselin De Melun II, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Alpaïs de Marolles, Dame de Blandy, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Gisèle De Cambrai nel 1172, nel Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 20 agosto 1182, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Louis De Melun Iが約1153年にフランスセアイネ-エト-マルンメルンメルン-スドで生まれた時，父Josselin De Melun IIは25歳，母Alpaïs de Marolles, Dame de Blandyは19歳であった。1172年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードカンブレイでGisèle De Cambraiと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1182年8月20日に30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Louis De Melun I(이)가 대략 1153년 프랑스 세이인-트-마니 멜루 멜루-수드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Josselin De Melun II(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Alpaïs de Marolles, Dame de Blandy(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1172년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 캄브라이에서 Gisèle De Cambrai(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1182년 8월 20일 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1153–about 20 August 1182: tany ho any amin'ny 1153–tany ho any amin'ny 20 aogôsitra 1182

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Louis De Melun I nasceu aproximadamente 1153, em Melun-Sud, Melun, Seine-et-Marne, França, seu pai, Josselin De Melun II, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Alpaïs de Marolles, Dame de Blandy, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Gisèle De Cambrai em 1172, em Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 20 de agosto de 1182, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Louis De Melun I родился около 1153 г. в местности мелун-суд, мелун, сине-ет-марн, Франция, его отцу по имени Josselin De Melun II было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Alpaïs de Marolles, Dame de Blandy, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Gisèle De Cambrai в 1172 г. в местности камбреи, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер около 20 августа 1182 г. в возрасте 30 лет.

sm.about 1153–about 20 August 1182: e tusa o le 1153–e tusa o le 20 Aukuso 1182

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Louis De Melun I nació aproximadamente 1153, en Melun-Sud, Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Francia, su papá, Josselin De Melun II, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Alpaïs de Marolles, Dame de Blandy, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Gisèle De Cambrai en 1172, en Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 20 de agosto de 1182, a la edad de 30 años.
